name: codespaces-k8s-lab
//: docker-in-docker gives a Docker daemon inside the codespace so kind can run. sshd lets `gh codespace ssh` reach the container from the CLI (the browser VS Code terminal works without it). kubectl/helm/kind are installed by setup.sh from official binaries + sha256 checks (NOT the kubectl-helm-minikube feature, whose Helm GPG keyserver verification fails the build).
